title: REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH - 211info
text: NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services include annual gynecological exams (including pap tests, breast exams, and sexually transmitted infection (STI) screening); pregnancy testing; birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception, and abortion referrals. 419 E 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Individuals with a household income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm; hours may vary based on staffing, call for current availability Email (541) 506-2600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 506-2600 TTY/TTD (800) 735-2900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: -None for individuals with a household income under 250% FPL -Sliding scale fees available for individuals with a household income above 250% FPL. Insurance will be billed, if applicable. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Sherman and Wasco Counties Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sterilization * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - FOOD HANDLER CARD ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - WATER QUALITY ASSURANCE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE ENROLLING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH LICENSED FACILITY INSPECTIONS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT
